title: Workshop notes
blurb: Short posts on what I'm making, why a thing is built a certain way, and the mistakes I'd rather you not repeat.

title: TypeWars
blurb: A cooperative typing game where five Legions liberate regions one word at a time. Multiplayer over a SpacetimeDB module.

title: Deck
blurb: Brief → plan → audio assembly. NLP picks tracks before MusicGen renders them so you know what you're listening to before you hear it.
